x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Creation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that establishes a new position, recording its initial quantity, value, and attributes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Update Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies position attributes, such as quantity, price, or status due to new events.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Increase Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that increases the size or quantity of an existing position (e.g., additional purchase or allocation).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Decrease Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that reduces the size or quantity of a position (e.g., sale, redemption, or allocation out).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Valuation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that updates the value of a position based on market price or valuation rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that corrects or recalculates position data due to errors or changes in assumptions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Transfer Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that moves a position from one account, portfolio, or owner to another.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Closure Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that terminates a position, typically when its quantity reaches zero or the arrangement ends.
